urls.title: USAfrica Prime — The Future United
urls.description: The architecture of a new era. A unified, sovereign continental power structured for prosperity and global strength.

text: Six autonomous AI agents deployed across social media, the open web, and diaspora networks — driving Pan-Africans, Africans of all ages, and like-minded global citizens to the coalition at https://t.co/syDUo4pbQD. Each agent operates in its assigned digital theater, amplifying
